mapper.select: select p.playlist_id as playlistId, p.playlist_name as playlistName, p.user_id as userId, p.create_time as createTime, u.username from playlist p left join user u on p.user_id = u.user_id order by p.playlist_id desc

select s.song_id as songId, s.song_name as songName, s.duration, sg.singer_name as singerName from playlist_song ps left join song s on ps.song_id = s.song_id left join singer sg on s.singer_id = sg.singer_id where ps.playlist_id = #{playlistId} order by s.song_id
